title: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * African American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * African American Community 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adolescents Adolescents * Hispanic/Latino Community African American Community Deafness Hispanic/Latino Community Men Native American Community Women Adolescents Adolescents * Hispanic/Latino Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON CHANGE CLINIC SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides culturally specific mental health and substance abuse services focusing on African American and veteran community members. Evidence-based outpatient substance use disorder treatments are conducted 10-20 hours per week, including medication-assisted treatment and recovery housing for 3-6 months or 18 months. 1312 SW Washington Street Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-6pm, Friday 8:30am-3pm Email (503) 719-7985 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON CHANGE CLINIC SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER COUNSELING
